name: SUPERNOVA ACADEMY
description:
SUPERNOVA ACADEMY

A prestigious high-tech academy designed for teenagers with extraordinary abilities. Instead of experiments, students are trained to master their powers, work as a team, and discover what kind of heroes (or people) they want to become.

The school is massive, filled with specialized classrooms, training arenas, and relaxation areas.

This is a School where Students learn that It's not just about Raising a Fist, but Lending a Hand

SCHOOL SYSTEM

  • Training Rooms → Now called Ability Labs (custom-made to withstand the student's power)

  • Break Time → Students hang out in the Nova Lounge (snack bar + chill area)

  • Supervision → Teachers and mentors guide them and train them to turn them into WORTHY HEROES
creator: ZacharyMorales
